What types of sexual health concerns does Dr. PK Jain Clinic treat? Dr. PK Jain Clinic provides diagnosis, treatment, and counseling for a wide range of sexual health concerns, including erectile dysfunction, premature ejaculation, low libido, infertility, sexually transmitted infections, and more. 2. What happens during a visit to Dr. PK Jain Clinic? During your visit, Dr. PK Jain will conduct a thorough assessment of your sexual health concerns, which may include a physical exam, medical history review, and any necessary diagnostic tests. Based on this assessment, he will recommend a personalized treatment plan. 3. Is Dr. PK Jain Clinic a safe and confidential place to discuss my sexual health concerns? Yes, Dr. PK Jain Clinic places the utmost importance on patient privacy and maintains strict confidentiality at all times. The clinic provides a safe, non-judgmental, and welcoming space for patients to discuss their sexual health concerns. 4. How can I make an appointment with Dr. PK Jain Clinic? To make an appointment, you can call the clinic at +91 94154 02646 or use the online appointment booking form on the clinic's website.
